content: HLS playback uses hls.js wrapper in lib/hls.ts. Both MediaPlayer and AnnotationMedia use same HLS-capable pattern.

Frontend CI: vitest (80% coverage), eslint + typescript-eslint, eslint-plugin-boundaries (architecture contracts), svelte-check, prettier. Run: npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test:all. Playwright E2E: chromium + firefox + Pixel 5.

name: Brand token enforcement
description: Wiring-lint tests (wiring-lint.test.ts) grep source for banned hardcoded colors (bg-blue-100, bg-blue-200, text-blue-500, text-blue-100, plus 4 original patterns). All brand colors must use bg-brand-primary/bg-brand-accent CSS vars. Intentional exclusions: focus:ring-blue-200 (UI chrome), text-blue-600 (link convention).

name: UIConfig CSS var pipeline
description: Layout onMount: loadConfig() -> Promise.all(auth.me(), loadUIConfig()) -> set CSS vars + data-profile/data-color-scheme on html. layoutReady gate prevents child render until init completes. color_scheme applies --scheme-bg custom property (warm:#fdf6ec, cool:#f0f4f8, high-contrast:#ffffff).

content: Runtime config: Django serves GET /config.json with API_URL and CRDT_URL. SPA fetches on startup via config.ts. Production: PUBLIC_API_URL + PUBLIC_CRDT_URL in service_config.env. Dev: VITE_API_URL + VITE_CRDT_URL in ui/.env.local.
